title: History Replay Overview — Single-Bet First Query View

query_params.lottery_type: optional — BIG_LOTTO | POWER_LOTTO | DAILY_539 | omit for all
query_params.bet_index: optional int 0-5, default 1; 0 = all bet counts

data_sources: list_strategy_lifecycle_metadata() — in-memory registry, all lifecycle states
strategy_prediction_replays DB — read-only aggregate query (COUNT, MIN/MAX draw)

default_bet_index_1_behavior.ui_default: _p259aBetIndex=1 on page load; bet tab data-bet=1 has p259a-bet-tab-active
default_bet_index_1_behavior.effect: Only strategies with derived_bet_count=1 shown in initial view

bet_count_filters.derivation: _derive_bet_count() extracts N from '_Nbet' suffix; biglotto_triple_strike→3; default 1

replay_status_filter.category_derivation: has_rows if DB rows > 0; artifact_only if REJECTED+non-executable; else no_production_replay

rejected_artifact_no_adapter_handling.approach: Single 'artifact_only' replay_status_category badge — no long warning in main table

detail_page_deferred_to_p259b.detail_page_note_in_api: 明細頁將於後續 P259B 實作，包含每一期預測比對與分頁查詢。
detail_page_deferred_to_p259b.detail_button_title_tooltip: 明細頁將於後續 P259B 實作，包含每一期預測比對與分頁查詢。

proof_no_db_write.code_review: Endpoint uses conn.execute(SELECT ...) only; no INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE

proof_no_replay_backfill.code_review: No replay generation logic added; read-only DB aggregate query only

proof_no_migration: No schema changes. strategy_prediction_replays table used as-is.

proof_no_large_per_draw_detail.code_review: Overview rows contain aggregate stats only (COUNT, MIN/MAX draw). No per-draw predicted_numbers, hit_numbers, etc.

next_allowed_task: P259B History Replay Detail Page — paginated per-draw replay query only, if explicitly authorized
